```{r}
#| label: global-package-setup
#| include: false

# Shared package setup for all chapters.
required_packages <- c(
  "gen3sis", "terra", "ape", "here", "phytools", "picante", "ggplot2"
)

# Single RNG seed reused across the course so stochastic examples render consistently.
course_seed <- 20260312
set.seed(course_seed)

missing_packages <- required_packages[
  !vapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)
]

if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing R packages: ",
    paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "),
    ". Install them first (e.g. install.packages(...)) before rendering."
  )
}
### WIP
# Optional packages used in specific chapters/exercises only.
optional_packages <- c("caret")
missing_optional <- optional_packages[
  !vapply(optional_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)
]

if (length(missing_optional) > 0) {
  message(
    "Optional R packages not installed: ",
    paste(missing_optional, collapse = ", "),
    ". Some sections may require them."
  )
}
###END WIP
invisible(lapply(required_packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
```
